overall.description: First-person walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring massive elevated highways, neon digital billboards, and transitioning from open sidewalks to a covered pedestrian underpass. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity lighting and dense urban detail.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with digital billboards

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the massive elevated highway structure, passing illuminated digital billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support columns
large illuminated advertisement displaying the Kiroshi optical brand with eye imagery
medical-themed advertisement with blue and white coloring
metal safety barrier separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic city at dusk. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while vehicles pass on the right. The space is semi-covered with mixed natural and artificial lighting, and no pedestrians are visible on the walkway.

events.description: slight left turn as the sidewalk curves following the highway structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curving sidewalk, passing a speed limit sign and approaching the intersection

entered.detail: large digital display showing a green-tinted face with glasses and text
road sign indicating speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole
various neon signs and advertisements on building facades across the street

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk curves left under the highway, passing a speed limit sign and various digital billboards. The camera moves closer to the intersection ahead, with neon building signs becoming visible on the right. The environment remains semi-covered with moderate traffic passing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection with dense neon signage

events.description: moving from sheltered sidewalk into the open intersection area with full sky visibility
multiple vehicles including a white sedan navigate the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the wide intersection, moving toward the underpass entrance while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan turning right at the intersection ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying PRIDE THERM in pink neon letters
traffic signals showing red lights above the intersection
dark entrance to the covered pedestrian walkway under the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with full sky visibility and dense neon signage including a prominent PRIDE THERM billboard. The camera crosses the asphalt road toward an underpass entrance, navigating around turning vehicles. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left as the camera approaches the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway with shop fronts

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway from the open street, lighting shifts to artificial neon
pedestrians become visible walking through the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered underpass, passing pedestrians and observing shop windows on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking away down the corridor

entered.detail: concrete underside of the highway forming the roof of the pedestrian tunnel
illuminated storefront windows displaying various goods and neon lighting
digital advertisements mounted on the walkway walls

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow covered pedestrian walkway beneath the highway, the lighting shifts to artificial neon. The concrete ceiling of the underpass dominates overhead while shop windows line the right wall. Pedestrians appear walking in both directions, and the environment becomes fully enclosed with no sky visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city at dusk, transitioning from a semi-covered sidewalk into a dense, neon-lit pedestrian underpass. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past digital billboards and passing traffic under a mix of natural and artificial light. As the sidewalk curves left, the camera approaches a wide intersection where the sky opens up and prominent neon signage, including a PRIDE THERM billboard, dominates the skyline. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the asphalt road and navigates around turning vehicles, moving away from the open air toward the mouth of a covered walkway. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed as the camera enters a narrow underpass, where the concrete ceiling replaces the sky and the lighting shifts entirely to artificial neon amidst a crowd of pedestrians and glowing shop windows.
